content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule (geomconf_9179.xyz), I can clearly identify atom C:15 and its neighbor atoms.

Atom C:15 (carbon with index 15) is connected to:
- H:20 (hydrogen atom) - visible as a white sphere connected to C:15
- C:12 (carbon atom) - visible as a yellow sphere connected to C:15
- C:16 (carbon atom) - visible as a yellow sphere connected to C:15

I can see three covalent bonds extending from C:15 to these three atoms, confirming they are the neighbor atoms.

The neighbor atoms of atom 15 (C) are:
- Atom 20 (H)
- Atom 12 (C)
- Atom 16 (C)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 9179 (from the filename geomconf_9179.xyz).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
